claim_statement: ORB intraday breakout strategy (15-min range, 1:1.5R, exit by 3PM) works consistently on SPY
verdict_reason: no edge: profit factor 0.91, net profit -4082.41 over 66 trades
operationalization_notes: strategy compiled; 66 trades, PF 0.91, WR 48%, net -4082 | exits were explicit (3PM EOD) — strategy ran cleanly but had no edge at 1:1.5R

claim_statement: On Bitcoin (BTC) 15-minute and 1-hour charts, when RSI drops below 30 and a bullish divergence forms — price makes a second lower low while RSI makes a higher low above its prior reading — a long entry triggered by a breakout of the interim swing high, with stop at the prior swing low and a 1:2 risk-reward target, produces winning trades.
verdict_reason: could not synthesize Pine Script — claude CLI timed out after 300s

claim_statement: When RSI drops below 30, the market is in an oversold zone where buying can begin.
verdict_reason: This is an educational definition of the RSI oversold level, not a falsifiable trading claim — no instrument, no timeframe, and 'buying can begin' is not a measurable outcome.
operationalization_notes: This is an educational definition of the RSI oversold level, not a falsifiable trading claim — no instrument, no timeframe, and 'buying can begin' is not a measurable outcome.

claim_statement: On Bitcoin 15-minute (and 1-hour) charts, when RSI drops below 30, if price subsequently makes a lower low while RSI does not confirm a lower low (bullish divergence), enter long on the break above the swing high between the two price lows, with stop loss at the prior candle low and a 1:2 risk-reward target.
verdict_reason: strategy compiled but produced no trades on BTCUSDT 15m — adjust the date range or instrument

claim_statement: On Bitcoin 15-minute and 1-hour charts, when RSI drops below 30, the price low of that candle is marked; if price then makes a higher high, pulls back to break that marked low while RSI does not make a new low (bullish divergence), a long entry at the break of the prior swing high with stop at the prior swing low and 1:2 risk-to-reward produces profitable trades.
verdict_reason: strategy compiled but produced no trades on BTCUSDT 15m — adjust the date range or instrument

claim_statement: When RSI drops below 30 (oversold zone), buying can begin and price tends to bounce.
